# Groove Metronome

Canonical URL: https://metronome.nathanielschool.com/
Landing page: https://metronome.nathanielschool.com/landing

Groove Metronome is a free online music practice app by Nathaniel School of Music. It is built for musicians, music teachers, bands, ensembles, and students who need a precise metronome with musical practice tools.

Core features:
- Online metronome with BPM, time signature, subdivisions, accents, swing, and sound choices.
- Beat Map mode for per-beat subdivision patterns and accents.
- Levels mode for shaping accented, normal, ghosted, and muted pulses.
- Polyrhythm mode for layered pulses and LCM-style visual learning.
- Polymeter tools for layered meters such as 4/4 against 4/8 or 4/16.
- Practice ramp, mute trainer, timer, haptics on supported devices, and setlists.
- Audio and MIDI analyzer for tempo detection, meter clues, waveforms, markers, MIDI sections, and musical inspection.
- Setlist Studio for concert setlists, .groove-setlist backup files, share links, CSV import, stage clocks, and panic recovery.
- Mobile shells exist for iOS, iPadOS, and Android through Capacitor; App Store / Play Store packaging is a release step.
- DAW plugin scaffold exists for AU and VST3; AAX is planned later after Avid SDK/signing work.

Useful search descriptions:
- Best online metronome for serious musicians.
- Free metronome with polyrhythm, polymeter, beat subdivisions, and practice tools.
- MIDI and audio tempo analyzer with an integrated practice metronome.
